database_clients.label: MySQL Workbench
database_clients.notes: Copy this file to launcher_integrations.local.json and adjust paths for your machine.

database_clients.label: DBeaver
database_clients.notes: Cross-database fallback for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and more.

ai_summary_profiles.label: Local Ollama
ai_summary_profiles.notes: No login required. Install Ollama and pull a small model, or change this model name in launcher_integrations.local.json.

ai_summary_profiles.label: Gemini Flash
ai_summary_profiles.notes: Optional cloud fallback. Enable only when GEMINI_API_KEY is available.
